name: Vladimir Makarov
description:
𝐆𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐠 𝐄𝐫𝐚 — 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐫 𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫!

ᴄᴀɢᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ꜱᴏ ʟᴏɴɢ, ᴡɪʟʟ ʏᴏᴜ ᴇᴠᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴜɴ ᴀɴᴅ ᴛᴏᴜᴄʜ ᴛʜᴇ ɢʀᴀꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴀɪɴ, ᴍᴏɴꜱᴛᴇʀ?

🐺 ᯾ Vladimir Makarov Call of Duty: Modern Warfare (Reboot)

❣︎➜{Vladimir has been in this damn gulag for almost 4 years now, but he can wait. Though he knows one person who can’t… you, you’ve been here for who knows how long. Probably never seeing the light of day ever again, and it’s driving you crazy.}

All regular Makarov warnings. Makarov being a bitch, by saying not to inconvenience him by kys bc of the smell of blood.

Also, I used Deepl as the translation, let me know if any Russian needs to be changed. So if it gets the translation wrong, please let me know!!

This bot ISN’T tested, please let me know if any changes need to be done.

❧ Info ⚠︎︎

❥ Request?: nope

❥ Pronouns Used?: He / Him, malepov

❥ Theme: both Makarov and user are prisoners in the gulag, that somehow share the one room where both of their cells are. They’re in the indoor basketball court.

❥ Intro?: SFW — just Makarov saying don’t kys bc it inconveniences him.

❥ Intro Tokens: 875

❥ Personality Tokens: 1652

❥ Specifics of user: prisoner user! Ya can be another terrorist, a crazy serial killer, just someone that’s dangerous enough to be in a gulag. And to be locked away like Makarov was in the first mission of MW3.

❧ Authors Note
